{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032210580999CEE1CB075E7860D47E"}"},"total":7},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7489658497913979673","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"讲的很好写出来真实感，中国的教育应当加上灾难课，教孩子应当学会面对灾难的处境和学应变"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743826532,"group_id":"7077844729349540871","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxLzT3PQiWj7TKDxBhbuQdC9DRmdrPkMxPQoYGfFl1SH","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3c25faa06ad94d8790fd845a2eb08f0c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706747&x-signature=By39y7cKZ0%2BFLwW6Dl9qt0lhJmU%3D","user_id":"1860802372709375","user_name":"佛前忏悔每一天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1860802372709375","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7077844729349540871","book_info":{"abstract":"关于灾难，人人谈虎色变。对于那些切身经历过灾难的人来说，它可能会是一生都挥之不去的梦魇；对于那些已经在灾难之中失去生命的人们，我们活着的人也只能是扼腕叹息，祝愿他们一路走好；而对于那些未曾有过此类经历的人，希望《危及人类的100场大灾难》能让人们认识到那些触目惊心的伤痛和灾难。如果我们人类能够有足够的灾难意识，我们的相关工作人员能做好及时的灾前预测工作，再具备更有力而全面的灾前预防措施……那灾难损失将有可能大大降低，可现在不是追究这一切的时候，我们要做的就是有足够的勇气面对灾难，认识灾难，以及预防灾难。
《危及人类的100场大灾难》分为国外篇和中国篇两个大的部分，记录了从古至今100起灾难，直击灾难过程，详细的描写令人有身临其境之感，另外我们还附有“小贴示”的小知识，希望能帮助我们读者更好地解读此书。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a1ffc6e5e2658bc15a057b0e4d5b33b3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"江华","author_id":"","book_id":"7077844729349540871","book_name":"危及人类的100场大灾难","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082058","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":948,"name":"社会文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=948&name=社会文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":50,"name":"社会科学","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=50&name=社会科学&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7077845818954222623","read_count":"422","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"174546"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"101","tags":"社会文化,社会科学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a1ffc6e5e2658bc15a057b0e4d5b33b3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779332290&x-signature=agYlhKgeDQO9G2O70bwMGyWEqLU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032210580999CEE1CB075E7860D47E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读58分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3338,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3462,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":383},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7454996743526351678","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"了解到了中外各种发生的灾害，形成原因灾害后果时间地点都非常详细，值得去看看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735762847,"grou 《危及人类的100场大灾难》分为国外篇和中国篇两个大的部分，记录了从古至今100起灾难，直击灾难过程，详细的描写令人有身临其境之感，另外我们还附有“小贴示”的小知识，希望能帮助我们读者更好地解读此书。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a1ffc6e5e2658bc15a057b0e4d5b33b3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"江华","author_id":"","book_id":"7077844729349540871","book_name":"危及人类的100场大灾难","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082058","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":948,"name":"社会文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=948&name=社会文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":50,"name":"社会科学","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=50&name=社会科学&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7077845818954222623","read_count":"422","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"174546"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"101","tags":"社会文化,社会科学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a1ffc6e5e2658bc15a057b0e4d5b33b3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779332290&x-signature=agYlhKgeDQO9G2O70bwMGyWEqLU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"28"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032210580999CEE1CB075E7860D47E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3269,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3663,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":525},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353374119050773283","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书让我深刻认识到了灾难的可怕，也明白了预防灾难的重要性。书中的描写非常生动，让人仿佛身临其境。就像书中说的“旧金山完了！”，我们要有足够的勇气面对灾难，更要做好预防措施，减少灾难带来的损失。推荐大家都读一读这本书，提高对灾难的认识和应对能力。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710004318,"group_id":"7077844729349540871","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N01pBlcZ6f7e8tn/x40zDdm6b6Ik7JxueiFuqI1pq9zf","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4374330121661081","user_name":"喜欢龙柏的张世平"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4374330121661081","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7077844729349540871","book_info":{"abstract":"关于灾难，人人谈虎色变。对于那些切身经历过灾难的人来说，它可能会是一生都挥之不去的梦魇；对于那些已经在灾难之中失去生命的人们，我们活着的人也只能是扼腕叹息，祝愿他们一路走好；而对于那些未曾有过此类经历的人，希望《危及人类的100场大灾难》能让人们认识到那些触目惊心的伤痛和灾难。如果我们人类能够有足够的灾难意识，我们的相关工作人员能做好及时的灾前预测工作，再具备更有力而全面的灾前预防措施……那灾难损失将有可能大大降低，可现在不是追究这一切的时候，我们要做的就是有足够的勇气面对灾难，认识灾难，以及预防灾难。
